markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the blog platform build and streamline the content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog Build Approved:** Dhruv will build the Sanity CMS blog, enabling direct table embeds (a key SEO feature) and using abstract, text-free featured images to simplify content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Content Workflow Streamlined:** GrowthX will now propose \~20 priority topics for Dhruv's quick approval, bypassing the slow review of the full 99-item list to accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Publishing First, Enrich Later:** To prioritize speed, articles will launch with minimal visuals. High-performing posts will be enriched later with custom graphics and product screenshots.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Attribution Strategy Defined:** GA4 will track blog-driven signups via UTM codes on CTAs. This method is required because the server-side signup event is not visible to GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Topics

### Blog Platform Build

  - [**Platform:** Sanity CMS, built by Dhruv.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**URL Structure:** `/blog/article-slug` or `/insights/article-slug`.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Direct Table Embeds:** Enables simple copy-ppaste of tables, a key feature for LLM-friendly content, bypassing Webflow's complex HTML conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
      - [**CTA Fields:** Dhruv will build the CTA component; Aida will provide copy examples.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**SEO Tagging:** Articles tagged "SEO" will appear in a dedicated section.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Featured Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Style:** More abstract than the initial "flowery" AI-generated concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Format:** Text-free images only. This avoids manual re-creation when article titles are updated.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### Content Workflow & Strategy

  - [**Topic Selection:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**Problem:** Reviewing the 99-item keyword list was a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will propose a curated list of \~20 priority topics (mixing commercial and informational intent) for Dhruv's quick approval.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Visuals & Publishing:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [**Problem:** Callie requested more visuals (flowcharts, screenshots).](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize publishing speed over initial visual enrichment.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Images don't impact SEO ranking or indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
          - [**Process:** Launch articles quickly, then enrich high-performing posts later.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Resources:** Limited product screenshots are available at `createanything.com/brand`.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### Performance Tracking & Attribution

  - [**Goal:** Attribute signups and subscriptions to specific blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**Challenge:** The server-side signup event is not visible to GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [**Solution:** Add UTM codes to all blog CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** GA4 exploration reports will track user journeys from specific blog URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Dhruv will automate UTM code addition in the blog build.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Aida will research best practices for UTM-based attribution from long-term clients.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dhruv:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Build the Sanity CMS blog with direct table embeds and UTM-coded CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Share CTA field requirements with Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Research UTM-based attribution best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Brief Katya on the new abstract style for featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Nathalie:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [Compile and send the curated list of \~20 priority topics to Dhruv for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [Continue drafting "Digital products ideas" and "How college students make money" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [Await Callie's feedback on the "Lovable alternatives" outline.](https://fathom.video/share/_f5CVmPySdt1sM_5PrTdv9W-Cdncy7Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
